description: sunglasses that make you look like an icon: that's the thrill speedo offers! Whether playing sport, or hitting the beach, accessorise your active lifestyle with a pair of ultra stylish speedo sunglasses. With precision injected frames for ultimate strength and flexibility, these glasses are perfect for Sports activities with their durable and shatter resistant lenses.Lens width: 85 mmLens colour: BlackFrame colour: BlackTinted polycarbonate shatter-proof lens for UV protection in bright sunlightPlastic frame in an aerodynamic design for absolute comfort and durabilityRectangle lens for absolute style and protection from elementsFlexible hinges for durabilityFixed nose holder with a bridge which is part of the frame to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skinCareRemove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRemove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleanerDo not use your fingers on such stainsDo not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
